Resident Evil: The Final Chapter (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $26,844,692Details
International Box Office $287,256,498
Worldwide Box Office $314,101,190
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,994,603
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,164,232
Total $10,158,835
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Alice is the only survivor of what was meant to be humanity’s final stand against the undead. Now, she must return to where the nightmare began—The Hive in Raccoon City, where the Umbrella Corporation is gathering its forces for a final strike against the only remaining survivors of the apocalypse.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,601,682 (50.7% of total gross)
Legs:1.97 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:8.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 7.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,104 opening theaters/3,104 max. theaters, 2.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $35,792,919

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 27th, 2017 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: December 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (Japan)
January 19th, 2017 (Wide) (South Korea)
January 19th, 2017 (Wide) (Malaysia)
January 25th, 2017 (Wide) (Trinidad)
January 25th, 2017 (Wide) (Indonesia)
Video Release: May 2nd, 2017 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sequences of violence throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2456 (Cert #50102), 12/21/2016)
Running Time: 106 minutes
Franchise: Resident Evil
Cast, crew, or production detail: Archival Footage of Previous Installment, Family Affair, Legacy Sequel
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Corporate Malfeasance, Monster, Non-Chronological, Zombies
Social setting: End of the World, Post Apocalypse
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, Constantin Film, Davis Films, Impact Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
